All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

A

applyGlowEffect() - Method in class com.example.escriturarapida.controller.GameController
Applies a purple glow effect to the word label.
applyLabelStyles() - Method in class com.example.escriturarapida.controller.GameController
Sets the initial orange color style on timer and level labels.
audioManager - Variable in class com.example.escriturarapida.controller.GameController
Shared audio manager instance injected via GameController.setAudioManager(AudioManager).
audioManager - Variable in class com.example.escriturarapida.controller.PauseController
Shared audio manager instance injected via PauseController.setAudioManager(AudioManager).
audioManager - Variable in class com.example.escriturarapida.controller.StartController
Shared audio manager injected via StartController.setAudioManager(AudioManager).
AudioManager - Class in com.example.escriturarapida.utilities
Manages background music playback for the application by dividing a single audio file into named sections and switching between them based on the current game state.
AudioManager(String) - Constructor for class com.example.escriturarapida.utilities.AudioManager
Creates a new AudioManager backed by the audio file at the given URL.
AudioReceiver - Interface in com.example.escriturarapida.utilities
Marks a controller or component as capable of receiving a shared AudioManager instance through dependency injection.
